case_title: MELBA CAJINA VS. ELECTRIC TRANSIT, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-22-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-11-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST FULVIO F. CAJINA, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-27-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-13-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. [VACATED PER COURT'S ORAL ORDER AT THE 4-09-19 OSC HEARING.]

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. All previously imposed sanctions are vacated per request of plaintiff's counsel. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Continued To Jan-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Jan-29-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
